question: Which makers designed more than 3 car models? List full name and the id.

payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT cm.Id, cm.FullName, COUNT(cn.Model) AS ModelCount FROM car_makers cm JOIN car_names cn ON cm.Id = cn.MakeId GROUP BY cm.Id, cm.FullName HAVING COUNT(cn.Model) > 3 ORDER BY ModelCount DESC;'}
